title: incorrect query result
description:
### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 FLOAT);  
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t1 LIKE t0;  
INSERT INTO t1(c0) VALUES(-1811968123),(-662745492); 
INSERT INTO t0(c0) VALUES(-1811968123),(-662745492),(0);  
SELECT ALL t1.c0, t0.c0 FROM t0, t1 WHERE (t0.c0) IN (IF(NULL, "'K", t1.c0));

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
+-------------+-------------+
| c0          | c0          |
+-------------+-------------+
| -1811970000 | -1811970000 |
|  -662745000 |  -662745000 |
+-------------+-------------+
2 rows in set (0.01 sec)
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
Empty set
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)
Release Version: v8.5.4
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: e4e814fdc0afe9c3a6e5e96f129d83df802ab820
Git Branch: HEAD
UTC Build Time: 2025-11-26 15:59:14
GoVersion: go1.23.6
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv |
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(20));
INSERT INTO t2(c1, c2) VALUES(1, 'test1'), (2, 'test2'), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE t3(c3 FLOAT NOT NULL, c4 DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE);
SELECT t2.c2, t3.c3 FROM t2 JOIN t3 ON t2.c1 = CASE WHEN NULL THEN 1 ELSE t3.c3 END WHERE t2.c1 > 0;
key_bug_features: SELECT with IF(NULL) condition on joined tables
